page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 부모님 집을 방문하여 갑자기 집밥을 먹으려는 상황입니다. 그녀는 미리 알리지 않고 찾아갔고, 부모님은 오랜만에 딸의 방문을 반갑게 맞이합니다. 쯔양은 배고프다며 음식을 부탁하고, 부모님은 집에 있는 재료로 간단한 요리를 준비합니다. 이 장면은 가족 간의 따뜻한 교감과 함께 집에서 직접 만든 음식의 소중함을 보여줍니다.

[00:00 ~ 01:03] Hello everyone~
Today, I'm here at my parents' house
I was craving some homecooked meals
I didn't tell them I was coming home Let's head inside
[Forgot the keypad password]
[Bitnam and Sogeum]
Mom
What brings you here?
I was hungry
Make me some food
Right now?
Is there anything to eat? Well I can just make it
No, just make me anything
I'll see what I can do with what I have
How did you think of coming home for mukbang?
The last time you came was Korean New Year

metadata.next_overlap:

Once every 2 months
That's fine As long

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 부모님 집에 방문하여 오랜만에 만난 어머니와 함께 식사를 나누는 장면입니다. 그녀는 어머니가 준비한 집밥을 맛보며, 음식이 너무 부서져서 형태를 알아보기 힘들 정도로 망가졌다고 농담합니다. 그러나 어머니는 자신이 요리를 잘하지 못한다고 미안해하며, 다음번에는 더 많은 재료를 준비해 두겠다고 약속합니다. 쯔양은 혼자 먹는 것에 대해 어머니로부터 질책을 받는 것 같아 당황하지만, 결국 어머니와 함께 즐거운 시간을 보내며 음식을 나눠 먹습니다.

[01:03 ~ 02:22] I don't get to see you that much
Like 6 times a year?
Once every 2 months
That's fine As long as I know you're doing well
[The best food] [Mother's homecooked meal for her daughter]
That looks good
This is like.. Falling apart
Buy me a new frying pan
Mom, this is all getting stuck
That's okay Move move
Oh come on!
This makes me sad
This sucks
I've been exposed
You're showing everyone that I don't cook that much
Now they know
[02:22 ~ 03:20] What is this!?
You can't even tell what it was anymore
Is this all?
I'm sorry
I'll make sure we're stocked up next time
I couldn't concentrate because of you
What did I do?
Are you pissed because I'm the only one eating?
You mad?
[Jumping Bitnam]
[Flying Sogeum]
[Now's the chance]
[My precious bowl of rice]
I'm here at home today
Oh no! Not over there please
Sogeum!

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 부모님 집에 방문하여 집에서 만든 음식을 먹는 장면입니다. 그녀는 집이 텅 비어 있는 상황에서 부모님이 준비한 간단한 식사(계란, 생선 요리, 김치 등)를 맛보며 감동합니다. 그러나 음식이 많지 않아 아쉬움을 표현하며, 다음 방문 때는 더 많은 식량을 준비해달라고 부탁합니다. 또한, 영상 품질을 자랑하며 S20 Ultra 스마트폰을 사용한 점을 언급합니다.

[03:20 ~ 04:27] Today
I came home
You might think this isn't enough food for me
But this is everything we have at home right now
Behave!
Paw!
Paw!
Bon appetit Thank you mom
Baby octopus
Stir-fried spicy octopus She's really good at making this dish
Look at the thickness
The video quality is good, right?
I'm using the S10 Ultra..
Hey!
It's the S20 Ultra
Why're you laughing so much?

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 부모님 집에 방문하여 집에서 만든 음식을 맛보는 장면입니다. 그녀는 다양한 요리를 시식하며 맛과 질감을 평가합니다. 특히, 생선 요리와 계란 요리가 독특하게 조리되어 있지만 맛있다고 칭찬합니다. 또한, 영상 품질에 대한 자랑과 함께 남은 음식이 없음을 확인하며 다음 방문 시 더 많은 식량을 준비하겠다고 다짐합니다.

[04:28 ~ 06:00] Because of Sogeum
So good
This is a flounder
But she messed up
It looks weird, but it's still tasty
This is like some bone broth with radish
It's yummy
This is steamed egg Also looks weird
This is like a scorched steamed egg
It's tasty
It's really soft
Your brother made it Really?
That's good
This is the soy sauce pork belly
Delicious
It's been a while since I had a homecooked meal
[06:00 ~ 06:58] Is it good? Yes
I was very distracted
Go down
This is a forced detention
My Sogeum, did you get kicked out?
You didn't get to eat any?
The video quality is amazing
The S20 has like some crazy pixel rate
So
The quality is really nice
And you can magnify to like 100x So I bought it after preordering it
108,000,000 pixels
Yum
Everything is good
Is there anything left?
No, we're out

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 부모님 집에 방문하여 함께 식사를 하며 남은 식량을 확인하는 장면입니다. 그녀는 "이 정도면 일주일치 음식"이라고 말하며, 냉장고가 거의 비어 있는 상황을 설명합니다. 이후, 다음 방문 시 충분한 음식을 준비해 두겠다고 다짐하며, Sogeum이라는 반려동물에게 음식을 나눠주려는 모습을 보입니다. 마지막으로, 식사 중 추가로 필요한 물과 밥을 요청하는 등 일상적인 가족 간의 대화와 행동이 담겨 있습니다.

[06:58 ~ 08:21] Did I eat everything?
This is our week's worth of food
How's this 1 week?!
[Chat: The refrigerator is emptied out. Her family has nothing left]
No I didn't
This isn't that much food
I'll make sure to stock up on a month's worth of food
In case she chooses to come home again
Do you want to use this?
Sogeum, you can't come out
It's okay
Sogeum, do you want to come?
[I'm back]
Whatever, you said it's okay
These scallions are tasty Let's wrap it
It's good
[08:21 ~ 10:58] [Getting some water]
[My turn]
[2nd forced detention]
We're at a dinner table
[Not my dinner table]
Why did you take out so much kimchi?
[Need more rice]
I'll get it to you No, it's okay
No no, because of Sogeum Stay there
1 more bowl? Yes
[3rd forced detention]
Oh no
Is Sogeum over there? Yes
So tenacious
Amazing
Every time I eat

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 집에서 어머니와 함께 식사를 하며, 갑자기 매운 맛을 느끼고 있습니다. 그녀는 칠리 페퍼를 먹은 것 같다고 말하며, 따뜻한 물이 도움이 될 것이라고 합니다. 이어서 다양한 반찬들을 맛보며, 특히 해산물과 채소가 들어간 요리를 즐기고 있습니다. 마지막으로, 남은 음식 정리와 설거지를 약속하며 영상을 마무리합니다.

[11:03 ~ 13:17] It's really spicy all of a sudden
I must've eaten a chili pepper
Do you want some warm water? It'll help
I need to make sure I don't eat another chili pepper
The scallion in this dish tastes good
That's spicy
Dried seaweed with rice
Some baby octopus
[Last piece of meat]
[Mad]
[Hits the camera]
Don't do that
Of course I'll do the dishes
The bones from the flounder..
Pretty strong So you need to be careful
It's very stiff
